description_long: This is a large, single-family house situated on a spacious grassy lot with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof in a dark color, with several protruding sections and varying roof heights. The front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and a curved driveway loop, suggesting a welcoming and formal approach. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of standard and larger window sizes distributed across the facade. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof, and the house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional suburban architectural elements, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A large, multi-gabled suburban house with a dark roof, light exterior walls, and a prominent covered entryway, set on a spacious grassy lot with a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, curved driveway, and the full expanse of the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the driveway extending to the side, and the layered roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional roof sections, and the continuation of the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the house's width, the driveway's approach, and the arrangement of rooflines.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, curved driveway approach, and a prominent main door
